synthesis_case.question: What were the primary drivers of Apple's revenue growth last year?

passages.title: Market report
passages.text: Strong iPhone sales, particularly in emerging markets, remained a major driver of Apple's revenue growth.

passages.title: Services review
passages.text: Apple's Services division experienced unprecedented growth, expanding by 20 percent year over year.

passages.title: Operations note
passages.text: Apple's resilient logistics network minimized supply-chain disruption and helped preserve market share.

passages.title: Noise passage
passages.text: The company also refreshed several retail store formats during the fiscal year.

disambiguation_case.question: What was the primary reason for choosing a multi-GPU training strategy for the Odyssey project?

passages.title: Project Odyssey: Final Architecture Review
passages.text: The final model for Odyssey had over 20 billion parameters. Training on a single GPU would have taken an estimated nine months. To reduce the training time to a feasible six-week window, a multi-GPU strategy was implemented.

passages.title: General MLOps Best Practices
passages.text: While multi-GPU training can improve model accuracy through larger batch sizes, that was not the primary reason in the Odyssey project.

passages.title: Project Apollo: Post-Mortem
passages.text: The earlier Apollo project used multi-GPU training primarily to handle very large medical images that would not fit into one GPU's memory.
